title: Evangelion Q Screening throughout Mexico October
display_title: Evangelion Q Screening throughout Mexico October
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Q Screening throughout Mexico (October)             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Thu Oct 10, 2013 8:59 pm At long last Eva Q will be shown subtitled at Cinemex's Anifest October 12, 13, 19, 20, 26 and 27 at different cities around the country (Mexico City, Guadalajara, Puebla, Villahermosa, Mérida and Quintana Roo) I think I can make it to Octobers 26's showing at Mexico City ... Though It'll cost about 70 US (bus, taxis and ticket)

[]:             Quote Post by Fuuforufu » Fri Oct 11, 2013 8:51 am On Cinemex Page, At the Queretaro complex, Evangelion is scheduled at 8:00 pm http://www.cinemex.com/cines/171 Im so F*¨king excited..... It amazed me, that they are going to show the bluray versión, and not the theatrical version

[]:             Quote Post by FluffyBunny » Fri Oct 11, 2013 2:47 pm [making a useless observation] Is it me, or does Asuka look somewhat different?

[]:             Quote Post by Fuuforufu » Sun Jan 19, 2014 8:48 pm There will be a second round on February This time will be Rebuild of Evangelión: 1.0 Rebuild of Evangelión: 2.0 and Rebuild of Evangelión: 3.0 The sad thing here is that Cinemex has an awful and poor service...the worst Dx On October i travelled more than 700 KM to see Q, previously i bought my tickets via web (one month before), with numbered seats, and when i came to the cinema they gave me normal tickets... With the excuse that there was no system due to a technical problem, and i had to watch the movie on the front row :/

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sun Jan 19, 2014 9:44 pm OHMYGODOHMYGODOHMYGODOHMYGODOHMYGODOHMYGODOHMYGODOHMYGODOHMYGOD They're bringing it to Veracruz!!!!! I'M SO FUCKING HAPPY!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Fuuforufu » Sun Jan 19, 2014 9:51 pm A few minutes ago they updates all the dates Here is the official page: http://www.madnessfilms.mx/tercerimpacto/ And this was my reaction:

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE-01 » Sun Jan 19, 2014 11:26 pm Can't find any place to buy tickets! -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Forget that! My precious!!!! BTW, to some mod... Shouldn't the thread's title change to "Throughout February 2014"? The October may be misleading nowadays...
